dsl_rule.translation_notes: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower, dc_middle) to represent range boundaries. Entry long when price crosses above lower boundary, entry short when price crosses below upper boundary. Exit conditions use middle line as reversal point per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Range duration approximated as 5 days for hold period. The signal is context-dependent: long at lower boundary, short at upper boundary.

backtest_rule.reason: Used Donchian channels (dc_upper, dc_lower, dc_middle) to represent range boundaries. Entry long when price crosses above lower boundary, entry short when price crosses below upper boundary. Exit conditions use middle line as reversal point per AUTHOR_SILENT guidance. Range duration approximated as 5 days for hold period. The signal is context-dependent: long at lower boundary, short at upper boundary.

source_rule_text: When price hits the boundary of a ranging market, go short at the top boundary and go long at the lower boundary.
